data_requirements.name: General ledger detail for substantive testing
data_requirements.scope: Full year, all accounts in scope

analytical_procedures.name: Three-way match (PO/GRN/Invoice)
analytical_procedures.description: Match purchase orders to goods receipt notes and vendor invoices to identify unmatched items
analytical_procedures.expected_output: Unmatched items flagged for investigation
analytical_procedures.tool_hint: pandas: multi-key merge/join, identify unmatched records

analytical_procedures.name: Receivables aging stratification
analytical_procedures.description: Stratify receivables by aging bucket and analyze provisioning adequacy
analytical_procedures.expected_output: Provision adequacy by aging bucket, under/over-provisioned amounts
analytical_procedures.tool_hint: pandas: groupby aging bucket, calculate provision rates vs historical loss rates

analytical_procedures.name: Substantive test sample selection
analytical_procedures.description: Select samples for tests of details using monetary unit sampling (MUS)
analytical_procedures.expected_output: MUS sample with items selected proportional to monetary value
analytical_procedures.tool_hint: custom MUS implementation: cumulative amounts, systematic selection

analytical_procedures.name: Revenue/purchase cutoff testing
analytical_procedures.description: Test transactions around period-end for proper cutoff
input_data: General ledger detail for substantive testing
analytical_procedures.expected_output: Transactions with cutoff issues (recorded in wrong period)
analytical_procedures.threshold: Transactions within +/- 5 days of period end
analytical_procedures.tool_hint: pandas: filter transactions near period boundaries, compare dates

analytical_procedures.expected_output: Chi-square test result, digits deviating from expected distribution
analytical_procedures.tool_hint: scipy.stats chi-square test on first digit frequencies
